name: vibe-hacker
description: Plugins for hacking, development workflows, and greenfield projects

plugins.name: greenfield-mode
plugins.description: Prevent backwards-compatibility cruft in prototype projects

plugins.name: primer
plugins.description: Context priming - load project files on session start

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Structured planning documents with protected paths

plugins.name: expert-agents
plugins.description: Domain-specific agents: code auditors, build verification, test runner, architecture audit, size tracking

plugins.description: Lightweight project backlogs for ideas, polish items, and small improvements

plugins.name: briefcase
plugins.description: Personal thought management — capture stray ideas, brief on topics, reorganize accumulated thinking
